known_issues.boot_bleed: position:absolute on #boot-screen allows 3D canvas to show through sides. Must be position:fixed with 100vw/100vh. Also Three.js renderer is initialized while boot screen is still active.
known_issues.camera_dolly: MainMenuScene.ts has CatmullRomCurve3 dolly path active after button click (startDolly). User wants FIXED static camera at (0,12,35) looking at (0,5,-20). World animates, camera does not.
known_issues.sur_menu: After main menu, Merlin's Lair (MerlinLairScene) is shown as an intermediate hub before the game. User wants: boot -> static menu -> click -> game directly. The lair scene is the 'sur-menu' to remove.

fix_specs.fix1_boot: index.html: change #boot-screen from position:absolute to position:fixed, top:0 left:0 width:100vw height:100vh z-index:9999 background:#000. The #app div must remain but the 3D scene is not initialized until after boot completes (Three.js not called during boot).
fix_specs.fix2_static_camera: MainMenuScene.ts: REMOVE createDollyPath(), REMOVE dollyActive/dollyProgress/dollyCallback/DOLLY_DURATION variables. Camera set once: position (0,12,35) lookAt (0,5,-20). startDolly() is replaced with no-op that calls callback immediately after 0ms. Show button immediately (remove 0.4s delay). Keep world animation (waves, sky, particles, cliff light).
fix_specs.fix3_remove_lair: main.ts: REMOVE the await runMerlinLair() call. Flow: runBootScreen() -> runMainMenu() -> [game init]. Keep lair HTML divs in index.html (harmless, display:none). Remove lair-related imports from main.ts.
